tagline: Your Go-To Beauty Solution While Traveling

trust_badges.badge_1: As Seen in Vogue & Vanity Fair

hero.headline:
Elite Beauty, Delivered To Your
Hotel Room
hero.subheadline: Traveling should never mean compromising on how you look and feel. NOMI Beauty brings top-tier hair stylists, makeup artists, and massage therapists directly to your luxury hotel room — so you step out looking flawless, every time.
checkmarks: Book via app, web, or concierge

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Luxury Beauty Services<br class="hidden md:block"> Brought to You
services.subtitle: From bridal glam to a quick blowout before dinner, our vetted professionals deliver salon-quality results in the comfort of your hotel room or home.

cards.title: Bridal Hair & Makeup
cards.description: Complete wedding day beauty for brides and bridal parties. Trial sessions and day-of styling delivered on-location at your hotel or venue.

cards.title: In-Room Hair Styling
cards.description: Professional blowouts, updos, and event-ready styles delivered to your hotel room. Perfect for business dinners, galas, and nights out.

cards.title: In-Room Makeup Artistry
cards.description: From natural daytime looks to full red-carpet glam, our trained makeup artists bring the studio to you with premium products.

cards.title: In-Room Massage Therapy
cards.description: Licensed massage therapists providing relaxation and deep-tissue massage in the comfort and privacy of your luxury hotel room.

cards.title: Group & Event Beauty
cards.description: Coordinated beauty services for bridal parties, corporate events, and special occasions with multiple elite artists available simultaneously.

cards.title: Celebrity & Editorial
cards.description: Red carpet, editorial, and high-profile event styling from artists who have worked Chanel Runways and been featured in Vogue and Vanity Fair.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Looking Your Best

steps.title: Book Your Session
steps.description: Choose your service and preferred time through our website, mobile app, or simply ask your hotel concierge. We confirm within the hour.

steps.title: We Come to You
steps.description: A vetted, elite beauty professional arrives at your hotel room or home with everything needed — premium products, tools, and expertise.

steps.title: Step Out Stunning
steps.description: Sit back, relax, and let our artists work their magic. Walk out camera-ready for your meeting, event, wedding, or night on the town.

about.label: Why Clients Choose NOMI
about.headline: Not Just a Beauty Service — Your Personal Glam Team
about.description: Founded in NYC in 2016, NOMI Beauty was born from a simple idea: luxury beauty should come to you. Our roster of expertly trained hair stylists, makeup artists, and massage therapists has served celebrities like Jessica Alba and Britney Spears, and our work has been featured in Vogue, Vanity Fair, and on Chanel Runways. We partner exclusively with four and five-star hotels to bring you the very best, every single time.

features.title: Celebrity-Trusted Artists
features.description: Our professionals have styled A-list celebrities, walked Chanel Runways, and been featured in the world's top fashion publications.

features.title: Luxury Hotel Partners
features.description: We partner exclusively with four and five-star hotels in NYC and Miami, ensuring a seamless, elevated experience from booking to beauty.

features.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
features.description: Not thrilled with your look? Our artists will adjust until you feel absolutely confident. Your satisfaction is non-negotiable.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Premium beauty services with clear, upfront rates. No hidden fees, no minimums — just exceptional artistry delivered to your door.

guarantee.headline: Our "Flawless Look" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely thrilled with your hair, makeup, or massage, our artist will adjust and perfect your look on the spot at no extra charge. We have built our reputation on making every client feel like a celebrity, and we stand behind every session.

faqs.question: How far in advance should I book?
faqs.answer: For regular services, we can often accommodate same-day or next-day bookings. For bridal parties and large groups, we recommend booking 2-4 weeks in advance to secure your preferred artists and time slots.

faqs.question: Which hotels do you service?
faqs.answer: We partner with luxury four and five-star hotels across New York City and Miami. If your hotel is not on our current list, reach out — we are always expanding our partnerships and can often accommodate special requests.

faqs.question: What products do your artists use?
faqs.answer: Our artists bring premium, professional-grade products from top brands. If you have specific product preferences or allergies, let us know when booking and we will accommodate your needs.

faqs.question: Can I book multiple services at once?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Many clients book hair styling and makeup together, or add a massage to complete the experience. For bridal parties, we coordinate multiple artists to service your entire group simultaneously.

faqs.question: What are your hours of operation?
faqs.answer: Our artists are available daily from 6:30am to 9pm. Early morning slots are perfect for wedding days and business events, while evening appointments work beautifully for galas and nights out.

testimonials.name: Sarah M.
testimonials.text: My friends and family LOVED my look and especially liked the intricate hair style! I highly recommend using this company — they made my wedding day absolutely perfect.

testimonials.name: Jessica L.
testimonials.text: The whole wedding party looked amazing and they were very professional. The best value for hair and makeup in New York. I would absolutely recommend them to anyone.

testimonials.name: Rachel K.
testimonials.text: They were quick to respond, flexible, and provided photos of their work beforehand. I was completely obsessed with my hair and makeup. The stylists were extremely friendly and talented.

contact.headline:

Absolutely Stunning?
contact.subtitle: Book your in-room beauty session today. Our elite artists are ready to come to you — at your hotel or home, on your schedule.
